changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_user.user_profiles WHERE id LIKE 'seed-user-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_user.user_profiles ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, last_modified_by, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, first_name, last_name, email, phone, gender, role, kyc_status, email_verified, phone_verified, customer_tier, pref_language, pref_currency, pref_email_notif, pref_sms_notif, pref_timezone, date_of_birth, referral_code ) SELECT 'seed-user-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW() - ((i * 3.65) * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW() - (random() * 7 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 'system', 'homebase', 'system', 1, (ARRAY['ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ACTIVE','SUSPENDED','PENDING_VERIFICATION','LOCKED'])[1 + (i % 10)], 'user-flow', NOW() - (random() * 30 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, (ARRAY['Aarav','Vivaan','Aditya','Vihaan','Arjun','Sai','Reyansh','Ayaan','Krishna','Ishaan', 'Ananya','Diya','Myra','Sara','Aanya','Aadhya','Pari','Kiara','Riya','Priya'])[1 + (i % 20)], (ARRAY['Sharma','Patel','Kumar','Singh','Gupta','Reddy','Nair','Joshi','Mehta','Verma', 'Shah','Rao','Das','Iyer','Chopra','Kapoor','Malhotra','Bhat','Pillai','Menon'])[1 + (i % 20)], 'seeduser' || i || '@' || (ARRAY['gmail.com','yahoo.co.in','outlook.com','rediffmail.com','hotmail.com'])[1 + (i % 5)], '9' || LPAD((800000000 + i * 73)::text, 9, '0'), (ARRAY['MALE','FEMALE','MALE','FEMALE','OTHER'])[1 + (i % 5)], (ARRAY['CUSTOMER','CUSTOMER','CUSTOMER','CUSTOMER','ADMIN'])[1 + (i % 5)], CASE WHEN i % 10 < 7 THEN 'VERIFIED' WHEN i % 10 < 9 THEN 'PENDING' ELSE 'NOT_STARTED' END, (i % 10 < 8), (i % 10 < 6), (ARRAY['REGULAR','REGULAR','REGULAR','SILVER','SILVER','GOLD','PLATINUM'])[1 + (i % 7)], 'en', 'INR', true, (i % 3 = 0), 'Asia/Kolkata', DATE '1985-01-01' + (i * 100 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 'HB' || LPAD(i::text, 6, '0') FROM generate_series(1, 100) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_supplier.supplier WHERE id LIKE 'seed-sup-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_supplier.supplier ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, last_modified_by, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, business_name, business_type, contact_email, contact_phone, tax_id, rating, fulfillment_rate, total_orders, total_returns, commission_rate, store_name, tier, description, gstin, pan, address ) SELECT 'seed-sup-' || LPAD(i::text, 3, '0'), NOW() - ((i * 7) * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW() - (random() * 3 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 'system', 'homebase', 'system', 1, (ARRAY['ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ACTIVE','PENDING_APPROVAL','SUSPENDED'])[1 + (i % 6)], 'supplier-flow', NOW() - (random() * 15 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, (ARRAY['TechZone','FashionHub','HomeStyle','GadgetWorld','KitchenKing','BookMart','SportsFit', 'BeautyBliss','ToyLand','GreenGarden'])[1 + (i % 10)] || ' ' || (ARRAY['India Pvt Ltd','Enterprises','Trading Co','Solutions LLP','Retail'])[1 + (i % 5)], (ARRAY['INDIVIDUAL','COMPANY','PARTNERSHIP','COMPANY','COMPANY'])[1 + (i % 5)], 'seller' || i || '@business.com', '98' || LPAD((10000000 + i * 111)::text, 8, '0'), 'SEEDTAX' || LPAD(i::text, 8, '0'), (3.0 + random() * 2.0)::numeric(3,2), (80 + random() * 20)::numeric(5,2), (100 + i * 50), (i * 3), (8 + random() * 12)::numeric(5,2), (ARRAY['TechZone Store','FashionHub Official','HomeStyle Mall','GadgetWorld Shop','KitchenKing Mart', 'BookMart Online','SportsFit Hub','BeautyBliss Store','ToyLand India','GreenGarden Shop'])[1 + (i % 10)], (ARRAY['STANDARD','STANDARD','PREMIUM','PREMIUM','ELITE'])[1 + (i % 5)], 'Premium seller on HomeBase marketplace since ' || (2020 + (i % 4))::text, '29ABCDE' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0') || 'F1Z' || (i % 10)::text, 'ABCDE' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0') || (ARRAY['A','B','C','D','E'])[1 + (i % 5)], (ARRAY['Electronic City, Bengaluru','Andheri West, Mumbai','Sector 62, Noida','Guindy, Chennai','Salt Lake, Kolkata', 'Banjara Hills, Hyderabad','SG Highway, Ahmedabad','Viman Nagar, Pune','Whitefield, Bengaluru','Malad, Mumbai'])[1 + (i % 10)] FROM generate_series(1, 50) AS i;

Track at homebase.in/orders', true), ('seed-ntpl-003', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ORDER_SHIPPED_EMAIL', 'EMAIL', 'Your Order Has Shipped - {{orderNumber}}', 'Dear {{customerName}}, your order {{orderNumber}} has been shipped via {{carrier}}. Tracking: {{trackingNumber}}', true), ('seed-ntpl-004', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ORDER_DELIVERED_EMAIL', 'EMAIL', 'Order Delivered - {{orderNumber}}', 'Dear {{customerName}}, your order {{orderNumber}} has been delivered. Please rate your experience.', true), ('seed-ntpl-005', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'PAYMENT_SUCCESS_EMAIL', 'EMAIL', 'Payment Successful - Rs.{{amount}}', 'Dear {{customerName}}, payment of Rs.{{amount}} has been received for order {{orderNumber}}.', true), ('seed-ntpl-006', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'PAYMENT_FAILED_SMS', 'SMS', NULL, 'HomeBase: Payment of Rs.{{amount}} failed for order {{orderNumber}}. Please retry. Ref: {{paymentId}}', true), ('seed-ntpl-007', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'RETURN_APPROVED_EMAIL', 'EMAIL', 'Return Request Approved - {{returnId}}', 'Dear {{customerName}}, your return request {{returnId}} has been approved. Pickup will be scheduled shortly.', true), ('seed-ntpl-008', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'PROMO_NOTIFICATION_PUSH', 'PUSH', 'Special Offer!', 'Exclusive deal for you! Use code {{promoCode}} to get {{discountValue}} off on your next order.', true), ('seed-ntpl-009', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'SUPPORT_TICKET_UPDATE_EMAIL', 'EMAIL', 'Ticket Update - {{ticketId}}', 'Dear {{customerName}}, your support ticket {{ticketId}} has been updated. Status: {{status}}.', true), ('seed-ntpl-010', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'SETTLEMENT_READY_EMAIL', 'EMAIL', 'Settlement Ready - {{settlementNumber}}', 'Dear {{sellerName}}, your settlement {{settlementNumber}} of Rs.{{netPayout}} is ready for disbursement.', true);

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_product.products WHERE id LIKE 'seed-prod-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_product.products ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, last_modified_by, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, name, description, brand, category_id, slug, base_price, hsn_code, country_of_origin, weight_grams, warranty_months, is_returnable, return_window_days, is_active ) SELECT 'seed-prod-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW() - ((i * 0.6) * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW() - (random() * 7 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 'system', 'homebase', 'system', 1, (ARRAY['ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ACTIVE','DRAFT','UNDER_REVIEW','DISABLED'])[1 + (i % 10)], 'product-flow', NOW() - (random() * 30 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, (ARRAY['Samsung Galaxy M34 5G','iPhone 15 Pro Max','Xiaomi Redmi Note 13','OnePlus Nord CE 4','Realme Narzo 70', 'HP Pavilion Laptop 15','Dell Inspiron 14','Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 3','Asus VivoBook 15','Acer Aspire 5', 'Nike Air Max 270','Puma RS-X Sneakers','Bata Comfit Shoes','Adidas Ultraboost','Reebok Classic', 'Levis 511 Slim Jeans','Raymond Formal Shirt','Allen Solly Polo','Peter England Trousers','Jockey T-Shirt', 'Boat Airdopes 141','Sony WH-1000XM5','Bose QC45','JBL Flip 6','Noise ColorFit Pro', 'Prestige Induction Cooktop','Bajaj Mixer Grinder','Philips Air Fryer','IFB Microwave','Havells Insta Cook', 'Titan Octane Watch','Fastrack Reflex','Casio G-Shock','Fossil Gen 6','Sonata Stride', 'Wildcraft Rucksack 45L','American Tourister Trolley','Safari Pentagon Bag','Skybags Brat','VIP Aristocrat', 'Canon EOS R50','Nikon Z30','GoPro Hero 12','DJI Mini 3','Fujifilm Instax Mini', 'LG 55 inch OLED TV','Samsung 43 inch Crystal','Sony Bravia 50 inch','TCL 32 inch HD','Xiaomi Smart TV 5A'])[1 + (i % 50)] || ' (Variant ' || ((i / 50) + 1)::text || ')', 'High quality product with premium features. Perfect for Indian consumers. Free delivery available.', (ARRAY['Samsung','Apple','Xiaomi','OnePlus','Realme','HP','Dell','Lenovo','Asus','Acer', 'Nike','Puma','Bata','Adidas','Reebok','Levis','Raymond','Allen Solly','Peter England','Jockey', 'Boat','Sony','Bose','JBL','Noise','Prestige','Bajaj','Philips','IFB','Havells'])[1 + (i % 30)], 'seed-cat-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 20))::text, 3, '0'), 'seed-product-' || i || '-variant-' || ((i / 50) + 1), (500 + (random() * 49500))::numeric(12,2), (ARRAY['85171300','84713010','85177900','84713020','85171200','84713041','84714190','84713049','84714190','84713041', '64041100','64029990','64039990','64041100','64029990','62034200','62052000','61099090','62034200','61091000', '85183000','85183000','85183000','85183000','91022100','73211100','85094010','85166040','85165000','73211100', '91022100','91022100','91022100','91022100','91022100','42029290','42021290','42029290','42021290','42029290', '90065900','90065900','85258090','88061000','90065900','85287300','85287300','85287300','85287300','85287300'])[1 + (i % 50)], 'India', (100 + (random() * 5000))::int, (ARRAY[6,12,12,24,6,12,24,12,24,12])[1 + (i % 10)], (i % 10 != 9), 7, (i % 10 < 8) FROM generate_series(1, 500) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_product.product_variants WHERE id LIKE 'seed-pv-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_product.product_variants (id, product_id, sku) SELECT 'seed-pv-' || LPAD(i::text, 5, '0'), 'seed-prod-' || LPAD((1 + ((i - 1) / 2))::text, 4, '0'), 'SEED-SKU-' || LPAD(i::text, 6, '0') FROM generate_series(1, 1000) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_user.user_address WHERE id LIKE 'seed-addr-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_user.user_address ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, user_id, label, line1, line2, city, state, postal_code, country, is_default ) SELECT 'seed-addr-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 180 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'seed-user-' || LPAD((1 + ((i - 1) / 2))::text, 4, '0'), CASE WHEN i % 2 = 1 THEN 'Home' ELSE 'Office' END, (ARRAY['Flat 101, Prestige Towers','204, Raheja Arcade','B-12, DLF Phase 3','301, Hiranandani Gardens','15/2, Brigade Road', 'A-7, Lodha Palava','501, Godrej Garden City','12, Phoenix Market City','G-5, Unitech Cyber Park','302, Oberoi Realty'])[1 + (i % 10)], (ARRAY['Near Metro Station','Opp. City Mall','Behind IT Park','Next to School','Near Hospital', 'Main Road','Cross Road','Ring Road Area','Highway Junction','Market Area'])[1 + (i % 10)], (ARRAY['Bengaluru','Mumbai','Delhi','Hyderabad','Chennai','Kolkata','Pune','Ahmedabad','Jaipur','Lucknow', 'Chandigarh','Kochi','Indore','Coimbatore','Nagpur','Thiruvananthapuram','Guwahati','Bhopal','Visakhapatnam','Surat'])[1 + (i % 20)], (ARRAY['Karnataka','Maharashtra','Delhi','Telangana','Tamil Nadu','West Bengal','Maharashtra','Gujarat','Rajasthan','Uttar Pradesh', 'Punjab','Kerala','Madhya Pradesh','Tamil Nadu','Maharashtra','Kerala','Assam','Madhya Pradesh','Andhra Pradesh','Gujarat'])[1 + (i % 20)], (ARRAY['560001','400001','110001','500001','600001','700001','411001','380001','302001','226001', '160001','682001','452001','641001','440001','695001','781001','462001','530001','395001'])[1 + (i % 20)], 'India', (i % 2 = 1) FROM generate_series(1, 200) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_onboarding.supplier_onboarding WHERE id LIKE 'seed-onb-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_onboarding.supplier_onboarding ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, supplier_id, applicant_name, business_name, business_type, training_progress ) SELECT 'seed-onb-' || LPAD(i::text, 3, '0'), NOW() - ((i * 5) * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, (ARRAY['COMPLETED','COMPLETED','COMPLETED','DOCUMENTS_VERIFIED','TRAINING_IN_PROGRESS','APPLICATION_SUBMITTED','DOCUMENTS_SUBMITTED'])[1 + (i % 7)], 'onboarding-flow', NOW() - (random() * 10 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, 'seed-sup-' || LPAD(i::text, 3, '0'), (ARRAY['Rajesh Sharma','Amit Patel','Priya Singh','Deepak Kumar','Sunita Reddy', 'Vikram Nair','Kavita Joshi','Manoj Mehta','Asha Verma','Rahul Shah'])[1 + (i % 10)], (ARRAY['TechZone India Pvt Ltd','FashionHub Enterprises','HomeStyle Trading Co','GadgetWorld Solutions LLP','KitchenKing Retail', 'BookMart India Pvt Ltd','SportsFit Enterprises','BeautyBliss Trading Co','ToyLand Solutions LLP','GreenGarden Retail'])[1 + (i % 10)], (ARRAY['INDIVIDUAL','COMPANY','PARTNERSHIP','COMPANY','COMPANY'])[1 + (i % 5)], CASE WHEN i % 7 < 3 THEN 100 WHEN i % 7 = 4 THEN (40 + (i * 7) % 60) ELSE 0 END FROM generate_series(1, 50) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item WHERE id LIKE 'seed-inv-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_inventory.inventory_item ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, product_id, variant_id, sku, description, quantity, available_quantity, reserved_quantity, damaged_quantity, low_stock_threshold, status, cost_price, supplier_id, primary_fc ) SELECT 'seed-inv-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 90 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, (ARRAY['IN_STOCK','IN_STOCK','IN_STOCK','IN_STOCK','LOW_STOCK','LOW_STOCK','OUT_OF_STOCK','DISCONTINUED'])[1 + (i % 8)], 'inventory-flow', NOW() - (random() * 15 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, 'seed-prod-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), 'seed-pv-' || LPAD(((i - 1) * 2 + 1)::text, 5, '0'), 'SEED-INV-SKU-' || LPAD(i::text, 5, '0'), 'Inventory item for product seed-prod-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), (10 + (random() * 490))::int, GREATEST(0, (10 + (random() * 490) - random() * 50)::int), (random() * 20)::int, (random() * 5)::int, 10, CASE WHEN i % 8 < 4 THEN 'AVAILABLE' WHEN i % 8 < 6 THEN 'LOW' ELSE 'OUT_OF_STOCK' END, (200 + random() * 30000)::numeric(12,2), 'seed-sup-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 50))::text, 3, '0'), 'seed-fc-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 5))::text, 3, '0') FROM generate_series(1, 500) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_warehouse.warehouse_locations WHERE id LIKE 'seed-wloc-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_warehouse.warehouse_locations ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, warehouse_id, location_code, zone, aisle, shelf, bin, location_type, capacity_units, current_units, is_active ) SELECT 'seed-wloc-' || LPAD(i::text, 3, '0'), NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'seed-wh-' || LPAD((1 + ((i - 1) / 5))::text, 3, '0'), 'LOC-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), (ARRAY['A','B','C','D','E'])[1 + ((i - 1) % 5)], LPAD((1 + ((i - 1) % 10))::text, 2, '0'), (ARRAY['S1','S2','S3','S4','S5'])[1 + ((i - 1) % 5)], (ARRAY['B01','B02','B03','B04','B05'])[1 + ((i - 1) % 5)], (ARRAY['PICKABLE','PICKABLE','PICKABLE','BULK','OVERSIZE'])[1 + ((i - 1) % 5)], (50 + (random() * 200))::int, (10 + (random() * 100))::int, true FROM generate_series(1, 50) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_pricing.pricing_rules WHERE id LIKE 'seed-pr-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_pricing.pricing_rules ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, name, rule_type, priority, discount_type, discount_value, active_from, active_to, active ) SELECT 'seed-pr-' || LPAD(i::text, 3, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 60 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, (ARRAY['Diwali Sale Discount','Summer Sale','Clearance Markdown','New User Welcome','Loyalty Bonus', 'Festival Special','Weekend Deal','Flash Sale','Bundle Discount','Category Promotion'])[1 + (i % 10)] || ' Rule ' || i, (ARRAY['PERCENTAGE','FIXED','PERCENTAGE','FIXED','PERCENTAGE'])[1 + (i % 5)], i, (ARRAY['PERCENTAGE','FLAT','PERCENTAGE','FLAT','PERCENTAGE'])[1 + (i % 5)], CASE WHEN i % 2 = 0 THEN (5 + random() * 45)::numeric(10,2) ELSE (100 + random() * 2000)::numeric(10,2) END, NOW() - (30 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW() + (60 * INTERVAL '1 day'), (i % 5 != 4) FROM generate_series(1, 50) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_compliance.platform_policies WHERE id LIKE 'seed-pp-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_compliance.platform_policies ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, name, policy_type, slug, title, category, display_order, is_footer_link, version_number, effective_from, content_plain ) VALUES ('seed-pp-001', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', 'compliance-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Return and Refund Policy', 'RETURN_POLICY', 'return-refund-policy', 'Return and Refund Policy', 'CUSTOMER', 1, true, '2.0', '2024-01-01', 'Products can be returned within 7 days of delivery for a full refund.'), ('seed-pp-002', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', 'compliance-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Privacy Policy', 'PRIVACY', 'privacy-policy', 'Privacy Policy', 'LEGAL', 2, true, '3.1', '2024-01-01', 'HomeBase is committed to protecting your personal information.'), ('seed-pp-003', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', 'compliance-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Terms of Service', 'TERMS', 'terms-of-service', 'Terms of Service', 'LEGAL', 3, true, '2.5', '2024-01-01', 'By using HomeBase, you agree to these terms and conditions.'), ('seed-pp-004', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', 'compliance-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Shipping Policy', 'SHIPPING', 'shipping-policy', 'Shipping Policy', 'CUSTOMER', 4, true, '1.8', '2024-01-01', 'Free shipping on orders above Rs.999. Standard delivery in 3-7 days.'), ('seed-pp-005', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', 'compliance-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Seller Agreement', 'SELLER_TERMS', 'seller-agreement', 'Seller Agreement', 'SELLER', 5, false, '2.2', '2024-01-01', 'Terms governing the seller-platform relationship on HomeBase.'), ('seed-pp-006', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', 'compliance-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Cookie Policy', 'COOKIE', 'cookie-policy', 'Cookie Policy', 'LEGAL', 6, true, '1.0', '2024-01-01', 'HomeBase uses cookies to improve your browsing experience.'), ('seed-pp-007', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', 'compliance-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Grievance Redressal Policy', 'GRIEVANCE', 'grievance-redressal', 'Grievance Redressal Policy', 'CUSTOMER', 7, true, '1.5', '2024-01-01', 'For complaints, contact our Grievance Officer at grievance@homebase.in.'), ('seed-pp-008', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', 'compliance-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Intellectual Property Policy', 'IP_POLICY', 'ip-policy', 'Intellectual Property Policy', 'LEGAL', 8, false, '1.2', '2024-01-01', 'HomeBase respects intellectual property rights and expects sellers to do the same.'), ('seed-pp-009', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'DRAFT', 'compliance-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Data Retention Policy', 'DATA_RETENTION', 'data-retention-policy', 'Data Retention Policy', 'LEGAL', 9, false, '1.0', '2025-01-01', 'HomeBase retains personal data for as long as necessary to provide services.'), ('seed-pp-010', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', 'compliance-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Anti-Counterfeiting Policy', 'ANTI_COUNTERFEIT', 'anti-counterfeit-policy', 'Anti-Counterfeiting Policy', 'SELLER', 10, false, '1.3', '2024-01-01', 'HomeBase has zero tolerance for counterfeit products on its platform.');

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

'COMMISSION_AGREEMENT', '1.5', '2024-01-01', true, 'ELECTRONIC_SIGNATURE', 'SELLER', true, 'Terms governing commission rates and settlement schedules.'), ('seed-agr-005', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', penalties for SLA breaches.'), ('seed-agr-006', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', 'compliance-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Product Listing Guidelines', 'Product Listing Guidelines', 'GUIDELINES', '2.1', '2024-01-01', true, 'CLICK_THROUGH', 'SELLER', true, 'Guidelines for listing products on HomeBase marketplace.'), ('seed-agr-007', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', ('seed-agr-010', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', 'compliance-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'NDA for API Partners', 'API Partner NDA', 'NDA', '1.1', '2024-01-01', true, 'ELECTRONIC_SIGNATURE', 'PARTNER', true, 'Non-disclosure agreement for API integration partners.');

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_order.orders WHERE id LIKE 'seed-ord-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_order.orders ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, last_modified_by, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, order_number, customer_id, total_amount, subtotal, tax_amount, shipping_amount, discount_amount, currency, item_count, description, carrier, estimated_delivery_date, invoice_number ) SELECT 'seed-ord-' || LPAD(i::text, 5, '0'), NOW() - ((i * 0.09) * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW() - (random() * 3 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 'system', 'homebase', 'system', 1, (ARRAY['CREATED','PAID','PAID','CONFIRMED','PROCESSING','SHIPPED','SHIPPED','DELIVERED','DELIVERED','DELIVERED','DELIVERED','CANCELLED'])[1 + (i % 12)], 'order-flow', NOW() - ((i * 0.05) * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, 'HB-' || TO_CHAR(NOW() - ((i * 0.09) * INTERVAL '1 day'), 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || LPAD(i::text, 6, '0'), 'seed-user-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 100))::text, 4, '0'), (500 + random() * 49500)::numeric(12,2), (400 + random() * 45000)::numeric(12,2), (50 + random() * 5000)::numeric(12,2), CASE WHEN random() > 0.6 THEN 0 ELSE (49 + random() * 200)::numeric(12,2) END, (random() * 2000)::numeric(12,2), 'INR', 1 + (i % 5), 'Order placed via HomeBase app', (ARRAY['Delhivery','BlueDart','DTDC','Ecom Express','Shadowfax','XpressBees'])[1 + (i % 6)], NOW() + ((3 + random() * 7) * INTERVAL '1 day'), 'HB-INV-' || LPAD(i::text, 8, '0') FROM generate_series(1, 1000) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_cart.cart WHERE id LIKE 'seed-cart-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_cart.cart ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, customer_id, subtotal, total, currency, discount_amount, expires_at ) SELECT 'seed-cart-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 30 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW() - (random() * 2 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 'homebase', 'seed-user-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 100))::text, 4, '0'), 1, (ARRAY['ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ABANDONED','EXPIRED','CHECKED_OUT'])[1 + (i % 7)], 'cart-flow', NOW() - (random() * 5 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, 'seed-user-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 100))::text, 4, '0'), (800 + random() * 30000)::bigint, (750 + random() * 28000)::bigint, 'INR', (random() * 1500)::bigint, NOW() + ((24 + random() * 48) * INTERVAL '1 hour') FROM generate_series(1, 200) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_cart.cart_item WHERE id LIKE 'seed-citem-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_cart.cart_item ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, cart_id, product_id, variant_id, sku, product_name, supplier_id, quantity, unit_price, line_total, available, image_url ) SELECT 'seed-citem-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 15 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'seed-cart-' || LPAD((1 + ((i - 1) / 3))::text, 4, '0'), 'seed-prod-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 500))::text, 4, '0'), 'seed-pv-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 1000))::text, 5, '0'), 'SEED-SKU-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 1000))::text, 6, '0'), (ARRAY['Samsung Galaxy M34 5G','iPhone 15 Pro Max','Xiaomi Redmi Note 13','OnePlus Nord CE 4', 'Nike Air Max 270','Puma RS-X Sneakers','Levis 511 Slim Jeans','Boat Airdopes 141', 'Prestige Induction Cooktop','Titan Octane Watch'])[1 + (i % 10)], 'seed-sup-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 50))::text, 3, '0'), 1 + (i % 3), (500 + random() * 15000)::bigint, ((500 + random() * 15000) * (1 + (i % 3)))::bigint, (i % 10 != 9), '/images/products/seed-prod-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 500))::text, 4, '0') || '.jpg' FROM generate_series(1, 500) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_promo.coupon WHERE id LIKE 'seed-coup-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_promo.coupon ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, code, name, description, discount_type, discount_value, min_order_value, max_discount_amount, start_date, end_date, usage_limit, usage_count, usage_per_customer, target_audience, auto_apply ) SELECT 'seed-coup-' || LPAD(i::text, 3, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 60 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, (ARRAY['ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ACTIVE','EXPIRED','PAUSED'])[1 + (i % 6)], 'promo-flow', NOW() - (random() * 10 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, 'SEED' || (ARRAY['DIWALI','SUMMER','WELCOME','FLASH','MEGA','SAVE','SUPER','BIG','DEAL','FEST'])[1 + (i % 10)] || LPAD(i::text, 2, '0'), (ARRAY['Diwali Special','Summer Sale','New User Welcome','Flash Deal','Mega Discount', 'Save More','Super Saver','Big Basket','Deal of Day','Festival Offer'])[1 + (i % 10)] || ' #' || i, 'Exclusive HomeBase discount coupon. Limited period offer.', (ARRAY['PERCENTAGE','FLAT','PERCENTAGE','FLAT','PERCENTAGE'])[1 + (i % 5)], CASE WHEN i % 2 = 0 THEN (5 + (i % 40))::float ELSE (50 + (i * 20) % 2000)::float END, (500 + (i * 100) % 5000)::float, CASE WHEN i % 2 = 0 THEN (200 + (i * 50) % 5000)::float ELSE NULL END, NOW() - (30 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW() + (60 * INTERVAL '1 day'), (100 + i * 50), (i * 7 % 100), CASE WHEN i % 3 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 3 END, (ARRAY['ALL','ALL','NEW_USER','ALL','PREMIUM'])[1 + (i % 5)], (i % 10 = 0) FROM generate_series(1, 50) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_offer.offer WHERE id LIKE 'seed-ofr-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_offer.offer ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, product_id, supplier_id, title, offer_type, original_price, offer_price, mrp, discount_percent, start_date, end_date, max_quantity, sold_quantity, seller_rating, buy_box_winner, fulfillment_type, shipping_cost, delivery_days, sku, stock_quantity, active, currency ) SELECT 'seed-ofr-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 60 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, (ARRAY['ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ACTIVE','ACTIVE','PENDING_APPROVAL','SUSPENDED','EXPIRED'])[1 + (i % 7)], 'offer-flow', NOW() - (random() * 15 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, 'seed-prod-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 500))::text, 4, '0'), 'seed-sup-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 50))::text, 3, '0'), (ARRAY['Best Price Guarantee','Festive Special','Clearance Sale','Limited Time Offer','Exclusive Deal', 'New Arrival Discount','Combo Offer','Weekend Special','Flash Sale','Member Exclusive'])[1 + (i % 10)], (ARRAY['DISCOUNT','FLASH_SALE','BUNDLE','CLEARANCE','SEASONAL'])[1 + (i % 5)], (1000 + random() * 49000)::numeric(19,2), (800 + random() * 40000)::numeric(19,2), (1200 + random() * 55000)::numeric(12,2), (5 + random() * 40)::numeric(5,2), NOW() - (15 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW() + (45 * INTERVAL '1 day'), (50 + (random() * 500))::int, (random() * 200)::int, (3.5 + random() * 1.5)::numeric(3,2), (i % 5 = 0), (ARRAY['MERCHANT','MERCHANT','FBA','MERCHANT','FBA'])[1 + (i % 5)], CASE WHEN random() > 0.5 THEN 0 ELSE (49 + random() * 150)::numeric(10,2) END, (2 + (i % 7)), 'SEED-OFR-SKU-' || LPAD(i::text, 5, '0'), (10 + (random() * 300))::int, (i % 7 < 5), 'INR' FROM generate_series(1, 200) AS i;

description, default_effect, active, target_module ) VALUES ('seed-pol-001', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', 'ruleSet-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Cart Validation Rules', 'Validates cart items before checkout', 'DENY', true, 'cart'), ('seed-pol-002', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', 'ruleSet-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Order Cancellation Policy', 'Rules for when orders can be 'ALLOW', true, 'pricing'), ('seed-pol-005', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', 'ruleSet-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Coupon Stacking Rules', 'Controls which coupons can be combined', 'DENY', 'review'), ('seed-pol-011', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', 'ruleSet-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Shipping Rate Rules', 'Calculates shipping based on weight and distance', 'ALLOW', true, 'shipping'), ('seed-pol-012', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', 'ruleSet-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Tax Exemption Rules', 'Identifies tax-exempt transactions', 'DENY', true, 'tax'), ('seed-pol-013', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', 'ruleSet-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Support Escalation Rules', 'Auto-escalate tickets breaching SLA', 'ALLOW', true, 'support'), ('seed-pol-017', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'ACTIVE', 'ruleSet-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Offer Approval Rules', 'Auto-approve offers from verified sellers', 'DENY', true, 'offer'), ('seed-pol-019', NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'DRAFT', 'ruleSet-flow', NOW(), 0, 0, 'Dynamic Pricing Rules', 'Demand-based price adjustments', 'ALLOW', false, 'pricing'), ('seed-pol-020', preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_order.order_items WHERE id LIKE 'seed-oi-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_order.order_items ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, order_id, product_id, variant_id, sku, product_name, quantity, unit_price, total_price, tax_amount, discount_amount, supplier_id, supplier_name, image_url, hsn_code, return_eligible ) SELECT 'seed-oi-' || LPAD(i::text, 5, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 90 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'seed-ord-' || LPAD(GREATEST(1, LEAST(1000, (1 + ((i - 1) / 3))))::text, 5, '0'), 'seed-prod-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 500))::text, 4, '0'), 'seed-pv-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 1000))::text, 5, '0'), 'SEED-SKU-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 1000))::text, 6, '0'), (ARRAY['Samsung Galaxy M34 5G','iPhone 15 Pro Max','Xiaomi Redmi Note 13','OnePlus Nord CE 4','Realme Narzo 70', 'HP Pavilion Laptop 15','Dell Inspiron 14','Nike Air Max 270','Puma RS-X Sneakers','Levis 511 Slim Jeans', 'Boat Airdopes 141','Sony WH-1000XM5','Prestige Induction Cooktop','Titan Octane Watch','Wildcraft Rucksack', 'Canon EOS R50','LG 55 inch OLED TV','Bajaj Mixer Grinder','Philips Air Fryer','Bata Comfit Shoes'])[1 + (i % 20)], 1 + (i % 4), (200 + random() * 15000)::numeric(12,2), ((200 + random() * 15000) * (1 + (i % 4)))::numeric(12,2), ((200 + random() * 15000) * 0.18)::numeric(12,2), (random() * 500)::numeric(12,2), 'seed-sup-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 50))::text, 3, '0'), (ARRAY['TechZone India Pvt Ltd','FashionHub Enterprises','HomeStyle Trading Co','GadgetWorld Solutions LLP','KitchenKing Retail', 'BookMart India Pvt Ltd','SportsFit Enterprises','BeautyBliss Trading Co','ToyLand Solutions LLP','GreenGarden Retail'])[1 + (i % 10)], '/images/products/seed-prod-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 500))::text, 4, '0') || '.jpg', '85171300', (i % 10 != 9) FROM generate_series(1, 3000) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_shipping.shipments WHERE id LIKE 'seed-shp-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_shipping.shipments ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, order_id, customer_id, carrier, tracking_number, shipping_method, estimated_delivery_date, delivery_attempts, shipping_cost, current_location, package_weight_grams ) SELECT 'seed-shp-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 60 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, (ARRAY['LABEL_CREATED','PICKED_UP','IN_TRANSIT','IN_TRANSIT','OUT_FOR_DELIVERY','OUT_FOR_DELIVERY','DELIVERED','DELIVERED','DELIVERED','RETURNED'])[1 + (i % 10)], 'shipping-flow', NOW() - (random() * 7 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, 'seed-ord-' || LPAD(GREATEST(1, LEAST(1000, i * 2))::text, 5, '0'), 'seed-user-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 100))::text, 4, '0'), (ARRAY['Delhivery','BlueDart','DTDC','Ecom Express','Shadowfax','XpressBees'])[1 + (i % 6)], 'TRK' || (ARRAY['DEL','BLU','DTC','ECM','SHD','XPR'])[1 + (i % 6)] || LPAD(i::text, 8, '0'), (ARRAY['STANDARD','STANDARD','EXPRESS','STANDARD','SAME_DAY'])[1 + (i % 5)], NOW() + ((3 + random() * 7) * INTERVAL '1 day'), CASE WHEN i % 10 >= 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN random() > 0.6 THEN 0 ELSE (49 + random() * 200)::numeric(12,2) END, (ARRAY['Bengaluru Hub','Mumbai Sortation','Delhi Gateway','Hyderabad DC','Chennai Sortation', 'Kolkata Hub','Pune DC','Ahmedabad Gateway','Local Delivery Center','Out for Delivery'])[1 + (i % 10)], (200 + (random() * 5000))::int FROM generate_series(1, 500) AS i;

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_payment.payment WHERE id LIKE 'seed-pay-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_payment.payment ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, order_id, customer_id, amount, currency, payment_method, gateway_transaction_id, gateway_name, payment_method_type, card_last_four, card_brand, upi_id, retry_count, idempotency_key, gateway_fee, gateway_fee_percent, gst_on_fee ) SELECT 'seed-pay-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 90 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, (ARRAY['INITIATED','PROCESSING','SUCCEEDED','SUCCEEDED','SUCCEEDED','SUCCEEDED','SUCCEEDED','SETTLED','FAILED','REFUNDED'])[1 + (i % 10)], 'payment-flow', NOW() - (random() * 7 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, 'seed-ord-' || LPAD(GREATEST(1, LEAST(1000, i + (i / 4)))::text, 5, '0'), 'seed-user-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 100))::text, 4, '0'), (500 + random() * 49500)::numeric(12,2), 'INR', (ARRAY['UPI','UPI','CARD','CARD','NET_BANKING','WALLET','COD','UPI','CARD','EMI'])[1 + (i % 10)], 'pay_' || (ARRAY['rzp','rzp','razorpay','paytm','phonepe','razorpay'])[1 + (i % 6)] || '_' || LPAD(i::text, 10, '0'), (ARRAY['RAZORPAY','RAZORPAY','PAYTM','PHONEPE','RAZORPAY','PAYTM'])[1 + (i % 6)], CASE WHEN i % 10 IN (2,3,4,9) THEN 'CREDIT_CARD' WHEN i % 10 IN (0,1,7) THEN 'UPI' WHEN i % 10 = 5 THEN 'WALLET' ELSE 'NET_BANKING' END, CASE WHEN i % 10 IN (2,3,4,9) THEN LPAD(((1000 + i * 7) % 9999)::text, 4, '0') ELSE NULL END, CASE WHEN i % 10 IN (2,3,4,9) THEN (ARRAY['VISA','MASTERCARD','RUPAY','AMEX'])[1 + (i % 4)] ELSE NULL END, CASE WHEN i % 10 IN (0,1,7) THEN 'seeduser' || (1 + (i % 100)) || '@' || (ARRAY['paytm','gpay','phonepe','ybl','okaxis'])[1 + (i % 5)] ELSE NULL END, CASE WHEN i % 10 = 8 THEN 1 + (i % 3) ELSE 0 END, 'seed-idem-pay-' || LPAD(i::text, 6, '0'), ((500 + random() * 49500) * 0.02)::numeric(12,2), 2.00, ((500 + random() * 49500) * 0.02 * 0.18)::numeric(12,2) FROM generate_series(1, 800) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_settlement.settlements WHERE id LIKE 'seed-stl-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_settlement.settlements ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, supplier_id, order_id, order_amount, commission_amount, platform_fee, tax_amount, net_amount, currency, settlement_number, settlement_period_start, settlement_period_end, disbursement_method ) SELECT 'seed-stl-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 60 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, (ARRAY['CALCULATED','CALCULATED','APPROVED','PROCESSING','COMPLETED','COMPLETED','COMPLETED','COMPLETED','DISPUTED','ON_HOLD'])[1 + (i % 10)], 'settlement-flow', NOW() - (random() * 7 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, 'seed-sup-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 50))::text, 3, '0'), 'seed-ord-' || LPAD(GREATEST(1, LEAST(1000, i * 3))::text, 5, '0'), (5000 + (random() * 45000))::bigint, (500 + (random() * 4500))::bigint, (100 + (random() * 900))::bigint, (200 + (random() * 2000))::bigint, (4000 + (random() * 38000))::bigint, 'INR', 'HB-STL-' || LPAD(i::text, 8, '0'), CURRENT_DATE - ((i / 5 + 1) * 14 * INTERVAL '1 day')::interval, CURRENT_DATE - ((i / 5) * 14 * INTERVAL '1 day')::interval, (ARRAY['NEFT','IMPS','RTGS','NEFT','IMPS'])[1 + (i % 5)] FROM generate_series(1, 300) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_notification.notifications WHERE id LIKE 'seed-ntf-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_notification.notifications ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, customer_id, channel, subject, body, recipient_address, reference_type, reference_id, priority, category, is_read ) SELECT 'seed-ntf-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 30 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, (ARRAY['CREATED','DISPATCHED','DISPATCHED','DELIVERED','DELIVERED','DELIVERED','DELIVERED','DELIVERED','FAILED','BOUNCED'])[1 + (i % 10)], 'notification-flow', NOW() - (random() * 5 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, 'seed-user-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 100))::text, 4, '0'), (ARRAY['EMAIL','SMS','PUSH','EMAIL','SMS','PUSH','EMAIL'])[1 + (i % 7)], (ARRAY['Your order has been placed','Payment confirmed','Order shipped','Out for delivery', 'Order delivered','Refund processed','New offer for you','Review your purchase', 'Flash sale starts now','Your cart is waiting'])[1 + (i % 10)], 'This is a notification regarding your recent activity on HomeBase.', CASE WHEN i % 3 = 0 THEN 'seeduser' || (1 + (i % 100)) || '@gmail.com' WHEN i % 3 = 1 THEN '9' || LPAD((800000000 + (1 + (i % 100)) * 73)::text, 9, '0') ELSE NULL END, (ARRAY['ORDER','ORDER','PAYMENT','SHIPMENT','RETURN','SUPPORT','PROMO'])[1 + (i % 7)], 'seed-ord-' || LPAD(GREATEST(1, LEAST(1000, i * 2))::text, 5, '0'), (ARRAY['NORMAL','NORMAL','HIGH','NORMAL','LOW'])[1 + (i % 5)], (ARRAY['TRANSACTIONAL','TRANSACTIONAL','TRANSACTIONAL','PROMOTIONAL','SYSTEM'])[1 + (i % 5)], (i % 3 = 0) FROM generate_series(1, 500) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_checkout.checkout WHERE id LIKE 'seed-chk-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_checkout.checkout ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, customer_id, cart_id, subtotal, tax_amount, shipping_cost, discount_amount, total, currency, shipping_method, idempotency_key, expires_at, description ) SELECT 'seed-chk-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 60 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, (ARRAY['INITIATED','ADDRESS_CONFIRMED','PROCESSING','COMPLETED','COMPLETED','COMPLETED','COMPLETED','FAILED','ABANDONED','EXPIRED'])[1 + (i % 10)], 'checkout-flow', NOW() - (random() * 5 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, 'seed-user-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 100))::text, 4, '0'), 'seed-cart-' || LPAD(GREATEST(1, LEAST(200, i))::text, 4, '0'), (800 + random() * 40000)::bigint, (100 + random() * 5000)::bigint, CASE WHEN random() > 0.6 THEN 0 ELSE (49 + random() * 200)::bigint END, (random() * 2000)::bigint, (900 + random() * 45000)::bigint, 'INR', (ARRAY['STANDARD','STANDARD','EXPRESS','SAME_DAY','STANDARD'])[1 + (i % 5)], 'seed-idem-chk-' || LPAD(i::text, 6, '0'), NOW() + (30 * INTERVAL '1 minute'), 'Checkout session' FROM generate_series(1, 300) AS i;

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_support.support_tickets WHERE id LIKE 'seed-tkt-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_support.support_tickets ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, customer_id, subject, category, priority, description, order_id, channel, reopen_count, sla_breached ) SELECT 'seed-tkt-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 30 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'seed-user-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 100))::text, 4, '0'), 1, (ARRAY['OPEN','OPEN','IN_PROGRESS','IN_PROGRESS','WAITING_CUSTOMER','ESCALATED','RESOLVED','RESOLVED','CLOSED','CLOSED'])[1 + (i % 10)], 'support-flow', NOW() - (random() * 5 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, 'seed-user-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 100))::text, 4, '0'), (ARRAY['Order not received','Wrong item delivered','Refund pending over 7 days','Payment failed but amount debited', 'Product damaged in transit','Delivery delayed beyond SLA','Return pickup not scheduled','Account login issue', 'Coupon code not working','App crashing on checkout'])[1 + (i % 10)], (ARRAY['ORDER','DELIVERY','PAYMENT','RETURN','ACCOUNT','PRODUCT','DELIVERY','ACCOUNT','PROMO','TECHNICAL'])[1 + (i % 10)], (ARRAY['HIGH','HIGH','MEDIUM','MEDIUM','MEDIUM','LOW','LOW','HIGH','MEDIUM','LOW'])[1 + (i % 10)], 'Customer reported an issue with their recent experience on HomeBase. Needs prompt attention and resolution.', 'seed-ord-' || LPAD(GREATEST(1, LEAST(1000, i * 5))::text, 5, '0'), (ARRAY['WEB','APP','EMAIL','PHONE','CHAT'])[1 + (i % 5)], CASE WHEN i % 10 = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, (i % 15 = 0) FROM generate_series(1, 200) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_review.product_reviews WHERE id LIKE 'seed-rev-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_review.product_reviews ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, product_id, customer_id, order_id, rating, title, body, verified_purchase, helpful_count, report_count, review_source ) SELECT 'seed-rev-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 90 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'seed-user-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 100))::text, 4, '0'), 1, (ARRAY['PENDING','PUBLISHED','PUBLISHED','PUBLISHED','PUBLISHED','PUBLISHED','PUBLISHED','PUBLISHED','FLAGGED','REJECTED'])[1 + (i % 10)], 'review-flow', NOW() - (random() * 15 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, 'seed-prod-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 500))::text, 4, '0'), 'seed-user-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 100))::text, 4, '0'), 'seed-ord-' || LPAD(GREATEST(1, LEAST(1000, i * 3))::text, 5, '0'), 1 + (i % 5), (ARRAY['Great product!','Value for money','Average quality','Not as expected','Excellent purchase', 'Good but expensive','Fast delivery','Poor packaging','Best in class','Decent product'])[1 + (i % 10)], (ARRAY['Really happy with this purchase. Product quality is excellent. Highly recommend to everyone.', 'Product is okay but could be better for the price. Packaging was decent though.', 'Amazing quality and fast delivery. Will definitely buy again from HomeBase.', 'Not what I expected from the images. Returning it. Delivery was fast though.', 'Perfect fit and exactly as described. The seller was very responsive.', 'Delivery was super fast. Product is good quality. Worth the price.', 'Packaging was damaged but product inside was fine. HomeBase should improve packaging.', 'Best product in this price range. Compared with many others before buying.', 'Average experience overall. Nothing special about this product.', 'Paisa vasool! Great quality at this price point. Very happy with HomeBase.'])[1 + (i % 10)], (i % 5 < 4), (random() * 50)::int, CASE WHEN i % 10 = 8 THEN (1 + (random() * 5)::int) ELSE 0 END, (ARRAY['WEB','APP','WEB','APP','WEB'])[1 + (i % 5)] FROM generate_series(1, 300) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_return_request.returnrequest WHERE id LIKE 'seed-ret-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_return_request.returnrequest ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, order_id, customer_id, reason, return_type, total_refund_amount, description ) SELECT 'seed-ret-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 30 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'seed-user-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 100))::text, 4, '0'), 1, (ARRAY['REQUESTED','REQUESTED','APPROVED','APPROVED','PICKUP_SCHEDULED','RECEIVED','REFUNDED','REFUNDED','REJECTED','CLOSED'])[1 + (i % 10)], 'return-request-flow', NOW() - (random() * 5 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, 'seed-ord-' || LPAD(GREATEST(1, LEAST(1000, i * 5))::text, 5, '0'), 'seed-user-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 100))::text, 4, '0'), (ARRAY['DEFECTIVE','WRONG_ITEM','NOT_AS_DESCRIBED','CHANGED_MIND','SIZE_ISSUE', 'QUALITY_ISSUE','MISSING_PARTS','DAMAGED_IN_TRANSIT','LATE_DELIVERY','BETTER_PRICE_ELSEWHERE'])[1 + (i % 10)], (ARRAY['REFUND','REFUND','REPLACEMENT','REFUND','REPLACEMENT'])[1 + (i % 5)], (500 + random() * 20000)::numeric(19,2), 'Return requested by customer via HomeBase app' FROM generate_series(1, 200) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_fulfillment.fulfillment_orders WHERE id LIKE 'seed-fo-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_fulfillment.fulfillment_orders ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, order_id, warehouse_id, user_id, priority, fulfillment_type, total_items, shipping_method, carrier, tracking_number, estimated_ship_date, estimated_delivery_date ) SELECT 'seed-fo-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 60 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, (ARRAY['CREATED','PICKING','PICKING','PACKING','READY_TO_SHIP','SHIPPED','SHIPPED','DELIVERED','DELIVERED','CANCELLED'])[1 + (i % 10)], 'fulfillment-flow', NOW() - (random() * 7 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, 'seed-ord-' || LPAD(GREATEST(1, LEAST(1000, i * 3))::text, 5, '0'), 'seed-wh-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 8))::text, 3, '0'), 'seed-user-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 100))::text, 4, '0'), (ARRAY['STANDARD','STANDARD','STANDARD','EXPRESS','URGENT'])[1 + (i % 5)], (ARRAY['SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER','SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER','SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER','PICKUP_IN_STORE','SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER'])[1 + (i % 5)], 1 + (i % 5), (ARRAY['STANDARD','STANDARD','EXPRESS','SAME_DAY','STANDARD'])[1 + (i % 5)], (ARRAY['Delhivery','BlueDart','DTDC','Ecom Express','Shadowfax','XpressBees'])[1 + (i % 6)], 'TRK-FO-' || LPAD(i::text, 8, '0'), CURRENT_DATE + (1 + (i % 3)), CURRENT_DATE + (4 + (i % 7)) FROM generate_series(1, 300) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_dispute.dispute WHERE id LIKE 'seed-dsp-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_dispute.dispute ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, order_id, customer_id, seller_id, dispute_type, reason, disputed_amount, priority, sla_target_days ) SELECT 'seed-dsp-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 45 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, (ARRAY['OPENED','OPENED','UNDER_INVESTIGATION','SELLER_RESPONDED','AWAITING_EVIDENCE','RESOLVED','RESOLVED','CLOSED','ESCALATED','REJECTED'])[1 + (i % 10)], 'dispute-flow', NOW() - (random() * 10 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, 'seed-ord-' || LPAD(GREATEST(1, LEAST(1000, i * 10))::text, 5, '0'), 'seed-user-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 100))::text, 4, '0'), 'seed-sup-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 50))::text, 3, '0'), (ARRAY['ITEM_NOT_RECEIVED','ITEM_NOT_AS_DESCRIBED','COUNTERFEIT','DAMAGED','WRONG_ITEM', 'OVERCHARGED','DUPLICATE_CHARGE','UNAUTHORIZED','SERVICE_ISSUE','SELLER_FRAUD'])[1 + (i % 10)], (ARRAY['Item not received after 15 days of expected delivery.', 'Product quality does not match the listing description.', 'Suspected counterfeit product received.', 'Product arrived broken and damaged.', 'Received a completely different item than what was ordered.', 'Amount charged was higher than the displayed price.', 'Charged twice for the same order.', 'Order placed without my authorization.', 'Seller not responding to return request.', 'Multiple complaints about this seller from different customers.'])[1 + (i % 10)], (200 + random() * 20000)::numeric(19,2), (ARRAY['HIGH','MEDIUM','MEDIUM','LOW','HIGH'])[1 + (i % 5)], CASE WHEN i % 5 = 0 THEN 3 WHEN i % 5 < 3 THEN 5 ELSE 7 END FROM generate_series(1, 100) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_reconciliation.reconciliation_batches WHERE id LIKE 'seed-rb-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_reconciliation.reconciliation_batches ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_late, sla_tending_late, batch_date, period_start, period_end, gateway_type, reconciliation_method, matched_count, mismatch_count, auto_resolved_count, unresolved_count, total_gateway_amount, total_system_amount, variance_amount ) SELECT 'seed-rb-' || LPAD(i::text, 3, '0'), NOW() - (i * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, (ARRAY['INITIATED','FETCHING','MATCHING','MATCHED','MATCHED','REVIEWING','COMPLETED','COMPLETED','COMPLETED','FAILED'])[1 + (i % 10)], 'reconciliation-flow', NOW() - (random() * 3 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 0, 0, CURRENT_DATE - (i * INTERVAL '1 day'), (NOW() - ((i + 1) * INTERVAL '1 day'))::timestamp, (NOW() - (i * INTERVAL '1 day'))::timestamp, (ARRAY['RAZORPAY','RAZORPAY','PAYTM','PHONEPE','RAZORPAY'])[1 + (i % 5)], 'FULL', (80 + (random() * 120))::int, (random() * 10)::int, (random() * 5)::int, (random() * 3)::int, (500000 + random() * 2000000)::numeric(19,2), (500000 + random() * 2000000)::numeric(19,2), (random() * 5000)::numeric(19,2) FROM generate_series(1, 50) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_analytics.daily_sales_summary WHERE id LIKE 'seed-dss-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_analytics.daily_sales_summary ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, summary_date, total_orders, total_revenue, total_units_sold, total_discount, total_tax, total_shipping, avg_order_value, new_customers, returning_customers, currency ) SELECT 'seed-dss-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, CURRENT_DATE - (i * INTERVAL '1 day'), (15 + (random() * 85))::int, (200000 + random() * 1800000)::numeric(19,2), (30 + (random() * 270))::int, (5000 + random() * 50000)::numeric(19,2), (30000 + random() * 200000)::numeric(19,2), (3000 + random() * 30000)::numeric(19,2), (2000 + random() * 18000)::numeric(19,2), (2 + (random() * 25))::int, (10 + (random() * 60))::int, 'INR' FROM generate_series(0, 364) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_analytics.product_performance WHERE id LIKE 'seed-pp-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_analytics.product_performance ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, product_id, period_date, views, add_to_cart_count, purchases, units_sold, revenue, returns_count, avg_rating ) SELECT 'seed-pperf-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW(), NOW(), 'homebase', 'system', 1, 'seed-prod-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 500))::text, 4, '0'), CURRENT_DATE - ((i / 500) * INTERVAL '1 day'), (50 + (random() * 5000))::int, (5 + (random() * 200))::int, (1 + (random() * 50))::int, (1 + (random() * 80))::int, (500 + random() * 500000)::numeric(19,2), (random() * 5)::int, (3.0 + random() * 2.0)::numeric(19,2) FROM generate_series(1, 500) AS i;

changeSet.author: homebase-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_user.user_activity_log WHERE id LIKE 'seed-ual-%'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hm_user.user_activity_log ( id, created_time, last_modified_time, tenant, created_by, version, user_id, activity_name, activity_success, activity_comment ) SELECT 'seed-ual-' || LPAD(i::text, 4, '0'), NOW() - (random() * 90 * INTERVAL '1 day'), NOW() - (random() * 90 * INTERVAL '1 day'), 'homebase', (ARRAY['system','system','admin','customer','seller','system','system','scheduler','admin','agent'])[1 + (i % 10)], 1, 'seed-user-' || LPAD((1 + (i % 100))::text, 4, '0'), (ARRAY['ACCOUNT_CREATED','LOGIN','PASSWORD_CHANGED','PROFILE_UPDATED','ADDRESS_ADDED', 'EMAIL_VERIFIED','PHONE_VERIFIED','KYC_SUBMITTED','TIER_UPGRADED','ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED', 'LOGIN','ORDER_PLACED','REVIEW_SUBMITTED','RETURN_REQUESTED','TICKET_RAISED', 'LOGIN','PROFILE_UPDATED','ADDRESS_UPDATED','WISHLIST_ADDED','LOGOUT'])[1 + (i % 20)], (i % 12 != 9), (ARRAY['Account created successfully via registration', 'User logged in from web browser', 'Password changed by user request', 'Profile details updated - name, phone', 'New delivery address added - Home', 'Email verification completed via OTP', 'Phone number verified via OTP', 'KYC documents submitted for verification', 'Customer tier upgraded from REGULAR to SILVER', 'Account suspended due to policy violation', 'User logged in from mobile app', 'New order placed via checkout', 'Product review submitted for order item', 'Return request initiated for recent order', 'Support ticket raised for delivery issue', 'User logged in from new device', 'Profile image updated', 'Default address changed to Office', 'Product added to wishlist', 'User logged out from all sessions'])[1 + (i % 20)] FROM generate_series(1, 200) AS i;
